# Chapter 5: Detailed design and analysis  (~100 pp)
- 5.1 From concept to detail (10) · 5.2 Tolerance budgets (15) · 5.3 Stress analysis at design depth revisited (12) · 5.4 Thermal, electromagnetic, fluid, control analysis (18) · 5.5 Design rules of thumb across disciplines (15) · 5.6 Engineering judgment: when calculation ends and judgment begins (15) · 5.7 Documentation as part of design (10) · 5.8 Failure section: detailed design that hid load paths from the analyst (5)

**Archetype**: balance, optimisation. **Project**: take one of the reader's previous Volume III-VIII projects and produce a full detailed-design pack. **Exercises**: 25.
